inputs.label: Height (Length)
inputs.businessContext: Recumbent length for infants under 2 years

inputs.label: L (Box-Cox power)
inputs.businessContext: Skewness parameter from WHO growth standards for given age and sex

inputs.label: M (Median)
inputs.businessContext: Median height for given age and sex from reference growth chart

inputs.label: S (Coefficient of variation)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of variation from WHO growth standards

formulas.erf: (zScore > 0 ? 1 : -1) * Math.sqrt(1 - Math.exp(-zScore * zScore * (4 / Math.PI + 0.147 * zScore * zScore) / (1 + 0.147 * zScore * zScore)))
